span.p:
LAN (RFC1918)
10.x / 172.16.x / 192.168.x
Blocked by gateway
bot cannot reach host LAN

span.p: Unlisted domains\nBlocked by default-deny\nHTTP CONNECT proxy

span.p:
Isaiah Jefferson
Full control:
- Approve/reject actions
- Gateway admin
- Container restart
- Secret rotation

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
AgentShroud Gateway
- Holds 1Password service account
- Enforces all security policy
- Signs all ledger entries
- Controls approval queue
- HMAC/JWT token validation

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
AgentShroud Bot
- No direct credential access
- No direct internet access
- All secrets via op-proxy
- All outbound via HTTP CONNECT proxy
- All MCP calls via MCP inspector
